summary: Ran backend + mobile-first frontend regression on public preview. Requested Builder Suite tabs, Web designer presets/code generation, game scene render, character/GIF/QR panels, and core APIs are working.

integration_issues.flow: Initial load with default example.com target
integration_issues.issue: Browser console shows CORS errors for example.com /cdn-cgi/rum request; non-blocking and app flow remains functional.

action_items: Optional: suppress/handle third-party CORS noise from external target pages in renderer logs.
Optional: align frontend backend-env key usage with EXPO_BACKEND_URL guidance for long-term consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py is very large (embedded HTML/CSS/JS) and exceeds maintainability threshold; split adapter assets/modules.
Injected adapter UI lacks stable data-testid hooks, making long-term automation more brittle.
No MOCKED API observed in this run.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/renders persistence test creates TEST_pytest render entry.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested: https://hex-palette-render.preview.emergentagent.com on mobile viewport 375x667. Verified 5 suite tabs (Web/Game/Character/GIF/QR), Web default active, Web presets include landing/theme-kit/overlay-plugin/portfolio/shop, theme-kit + maximal produced expected headline and 6 cards, generated code includes preset metadata + palette vars + Munker/hex/ruliad overlays + section/card/button styles, game tab shows platformer on 3-plane hex ground with cells, character tab shows 4 token cards, GIF tab keeps export panel usable, QR tab shows placeholder and extra idea cards. Backend pytest: 16/16 passed, including /api/health, /api/tonality-renderer, /api/site-html, /api/export-gif.
rca_of_issue: No blocking product regression reproduced. Observed console CORS entries originate from external example.com telemetry endpoint when rendering target page content; this does not break builder functionality or requested flows.
